description: Canonical labels for project memory clustering. Labels use prefix:kebab-case. Reuse existing labels whenever possible; add a new label only for a durable retrieval class that existing labels cannot express. Recommended prefixes: 'kind:' for the type of lesson, 'context:' for the situation it applies to, 'area:' for project subsystems (add your own), 'signal:' for recurring symptoms (add your own).

context:build.description: Build, compile, packaging, or release pipeline behavior.

context:deployment.description: Deployment, hosting, infrastructure, or environment configuration.

context:runtime.description: Behavior at application runtime rather than build or authoring time.

context:testing.description: Test suites, fixtures, flaky tests, or test infrastructure.

context:tooling.description: Editors, IDEs, coding agents, MCP servers, scripts, or developer tooling.

kind:architecture.description: A reusable structural relationship, subsystem map, ownership rule, or design decision.

kind:bug.description: A recurring failure mode, misleading symptom, or diagnosed defect pattern.

kind:convention.description: A project convention, naming rule, or agreement that is easy to violate accidentally.

kind:workflow.description: A practical workflow, sequence, workaround, or operational procedure.
